{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ghosts
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghosts]] are concerned about the tangled threads in the [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A committee of [[Ghosts]] determines [[Iteration]] names.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Iteration names are determined by a committee of Ghosts, not by whoever makes the world.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
